summary: [EIP-721](./eip-721.md) tokens can be deposited or staked in NFTs for a variety of reasons including escrow, rewards, benefits, and others. There is currently no means of retrieving the number of tokens staked and/or bound to an NFT. This proposal outlines a standard that may be implemented by all wallets and marketplaces easily to correctly retrieve the staked token amount of an NFT.
title: Interface for Staked Tokens in NFTs
